summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Acting Coach Mode feature. All 3 backend API endpoints working correctly (scenes, analyze, history). Frontend ActingCoachScreen and ActingFeedbackScreen both accessible and functioning. Premium gating working correctly - free users see 'Free Tip' card and 'Unlock Acting Coach' button instead of 'Coach My Performance'.

issues: data-testid='acting-coach-btn' not translating to HTML attribute in web preview - navigation still works via text click

critical_code_review_comments: Acting Coach API endpoints (server.py lines 2378-2496) correctly implemented with proper validation
ActingCoachScreen correctly displays 6 emotions, 4 styles, energy slider 1-10, and premium gating
ActingFeedbackScreen displays all required fields: performance_score, score_label, what_works, improvement_tips, example_delivery, director_note
Free Tip content dynamically changes based on selected emotion - good UX for free users
Scene shuffle functionality works correctly, cycles through 12 scenes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Acting Coach Mode feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/acting-coach/scenes (12 scenes), POST /api/acting-coach/analyze (GPT-4o AI coaching), GET /api/acting-coach/history/{user_id}. Frontend routes: /acting-coach (ActingCoachScreen), /acting-feedback (ActingFeedbackScreen). Dashboard has Acting Coach card with NEW badge in Quick Actions. On web preview, all users appear as non-premium (RevenueCat disabled on web), so 'Free Tip' card and 'Unlock Acting Coach' button are shown correctly.

tests_performed.result: PASS - Returns 12 scenes with title, context, genre fields
PASS - Returns AI coaching with performance_score, score_label, what_works, improvement_tips, example_delivery, director_note
PASS - neutral, angry, emotional, confident, nervous, vulnerable all work
PASS - natural_tv, dramatic, film_subtle, social_media all work
PASS - Scene card with 'The Breakup', 6 emotion buttons, 4 style buttons, energy slider, Free Tip card, Unlock button
PASS - Cycles through scenes (The Breakup → The Job Interview)
PASS - Clicking emotions updates selection and Free Tip content
PASS - Clicking styles updates selection with purple highlight
PASS - /acting-feedback accessible, shows all feedback sections
PASS - Card visible with NEW badge, navigates to /acting-coach
PASS - Free users see 'Free Tip' card and 'Unlock Acting Coach' button
